keyword_research.methodology: Clustered by intent (informational / navigational / commercial / transactional), market (India / UAE / global), and page type (homepage / service / location / blog). Priority = search_volume × commercial_intent × competition_gap.

tier_3_location_keywords.description: City-specific location pages. Each location needs a dedicated landing page with unique content.

tier_4_industry_keywords.description: Industry-specific SEO targeting. Each maps to an /industries/[slug]/ page.

tier_5_long_tail_informational.description: Blog-targeted keywords. High intent, medium volume, low difficulty. Build topical authority.

title_tag_formulas.example_homepage: Digital Penta | Digital Marketing Agency in Delhi | 2026 — Get Free Audit
title_tag_formulas.example_service: SEO Agency in Delhi | Digital Penta | 2026
title_tag_formulas.example_location: Best Digital Marketing Agency in Dubai | Digital Penta
rules: Max 60 characters (Google shows ~60 chars before truncation)
Include primary keyword in first 40 chars where possible
Every page must have a UNIQUE title tag — no duplicates
Include brand name at end separated by pipe |

meta_description_formulas.example_homepage: India's top digital marketing agency — SEO, PPC, Social Media & AI automation. 500+ clients. ₹50Cr+ revenue generated. Get your free audit today.
meta_description_formulas.service_pages: Expert {service} services in {city}. {Key result/benefit}. {Social proof number}. Free consultation.
meta_description_formulas.location_pages: Top-rated digital marketing agency in {city}. {Local market knowledge signal}. {Result metric}. Free strategy call.
rules: Max 155-160 characters
Include target keyword naturally
Include a clear call-to-action
Every page needs a UNIQUE meta description
Use numbers and specifics (500+ clients, 340% leads) for CTR improvement

h1_rules: One H1 per page — never more
Matches or closely relates to title tag
heading_structure.h2_usage: Main service/topic sections — include secondary keywords
heading_structure.h4_usage: Minor sub-points only — do not over-use

example_homepage_headings.h1: India's Most Results-Driven Digital Marketing Agency
example_homepage_headings.h2_1: Full-Service Digital Marketing That Actually Delivers ROI

principles: Short and descriptive — max 4 words in slug
No query strings or numbers in URLs
Consistent trailing slash policy (use trailing slash)

must_include: Trust signals (client count, years, ratings, awards)
Clear CTAs above fold and multiple throughout page
Internal links to all main service category pages
H1 with primary service + city keyword
Clear service description (what it is, what we do)
Who this service is for (industries/business types)
FAQ section (6-8 questions) with FAQ schema
Local market context (specific to that city)
Target keyword in H1, first paragraph, and at least 2 H2s
Table of contents for posts over 1500 words
Internal links (3-5 to relevant service/location pages)

rules: All images MUST have descriptive alt text — no empty alt='', no alt='image'
Alt text should describe the image and include relevant keyword naturally
Image file names: descriptive-keyword-words.webp (never image001.jpg)
Use WebP format for all images (smaller, faster than JPEG/PNG)
Add width and height attributes to prevent CLS
Add loading='lazy' to all below-fold images
Add loading='eager' and fetchpriority='high' to hero/LCP image
Compress all images: hero max 200KB, body max 100KB, thumbnails max 50KB

alt_text_examples.team_photo: Digital Penta team — digital marketing agency Delhi India
alt_text_examples.service_icon: SEO services icon — search engine optimization
alt_text_examples.case_study_chart: Client organic traffic growth chart showing 340% increase in 6 months
alt_text_examples.office_photo: Digital Penta office in Katwaria Sarai, New Delhi

principles: Homepage links to all 5 service category pages
Each service category links to all sub-service pages
Each sub-service page links to 3 related sub-services
All service pages link to relevant location pages
All service pages link to relevant industry pages
Blog posts link to relevant service pages (contextual anchor text)
Location pages link to service pages AND other location pages (nearby cities)
Case studies link to the relevant service and industry pages
anchor_text_rules: Use descriptive anchor text — never 'click here' or 'learn more' alone
Include target keyword in anchor text where natural
Mix exact-match, partial-match, and branded anchors
Avoid over-optimized anchor patterns (Google spam signal)

pillar_page_model.description: Topic cluster model: one Pillar Page per service category, multiple Cluster Pages (sub-services + blog posts) linking back

fixes: Preload hero image with <link rel='preload' as='image'>
Serve images from CDN (Vercel Edge / Cloudflare)
Convert all images to WebP format
Use next-gen image formats with fallback
Add explicit width/height to ALL images and iframes
Reserve space for dynamic content (ads, embeds)
Use CSS aspect-ratio for responsive images
Avoid injecting content above existing content
Debounce scroll and resize event handlers
Deploy on Vercel Edge Network (closest to user)
Use CDN for all static assets

site_architecture.description: Every important page must be reachable within 3 clicks from homepage

sitemap.auto_generation: Generate from Supabase published pages + static routes
sitemap.update_frequency: Submit to GSC within 24 hours of new page publish

rules: Every page MUST have a canonical tag pointing to its preferred URL
Homepage canonical: https://digitalpenta.com/
Use absolute URLs in canonical tags (not relative)
Paginated pages: canonical to page 1 OR use rel=prev/next
Location pages with similar content: canonical to most authoritative variant

Organization.name: Digital Penta
Organization.description: India's top digital marketing agency offering SEO, Google Ads, Social Media, Web Development, AI Solutions & Automation.

requirements: Viewport meta tag present: <meta name='viewport' content='width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0'>
No horizontal scrolling on any screen width
Font size minimum 16px for body text (prevents mobile zoom)
Mobile nav tested with screen reader

javascript: Code split by route — only load JS needed for current page
Remove unused JS (tree-shaking in Vite — already configured)
css: Tailwind CSS purged in production build — no unused utilities
fonts: Use font-display: swap to prevent invisible text during load
Preconnect to Google Fonts: <link rel='preconnect' href='https://fonts.googleapis.com'>
Subset fonts to Latin only for Latin-language pages
Consider self-hosting Inter and Plus Jakarta Sans
caching: Static assets (images, fonts, JS, CSS) cached with long Cache-Control headers
HTML pages: no-cache or short TTL (so content updates propagate)
Supabase queries cached at application level where appropriate

requirements: All HTTP URLs redirect 301 to HTTPS
No mixed content warnings in browser console

e_e_a_t_signals.description: Google's Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, and Trustworthiness framework. Critical for YMYL (Your Money Your Life) adjacent content like marketing services.
experience: Case studies with real client names, metrics, and verifiable results
Process documentation showing our real methodology
Real team member photos and bios
expertise: Author bios with credentials and years of experience on all blog posts
Service pages written with clear technical depth
Industry certifications mentioned: Google Partner, Meta Partner, HubSpot Partner
Publish data-backed research and original statistics
Staff LinkedIn profiles linked from team page
authoritativeness: Earn media mentions on Clutch, DesignRush, GoodFirms, Bark.com
Get featured in 'Best agencies in Delhi' roundup articles
Publish on industry sites (guest posts on Moz, Search Engine Journal India)
Build links from .edu and .gov sites where relevant
Aim for Wikipedia mention or citation in marketing articles
trustworthiness: Clear privacy policy and terms of service
GST registration number visible in footer
Physical address verified on Google Business Profile
Respond to all reviews publicly within 24 hours
No fake reviews — only authentic client feedback
Clear pricing transparency (at least starting prices visible)

link_building_strategies.process: Use Ahrefs/SEMrush to find broken links on high-DA Indian marketing/business sites. Create replacement content. Reach out to webmasters.
Sign up for HARO (Help A Reporter Out). Respond to queries about digital marketing, SEO, AI, India business. Earn mentions in major publications.
Find top-ranking content for target keywords. Create significantly better (more comprehensive, better designed, more current) content. Outreach to sites linking to the original.

link_velocity.warning: Do NOT use PBNs, link farms, or bought links — Google penalty risk is extremely high

google_business_profile.name: Digital Penta

optimization_checklist: Add 10+ high-quality photos of office, team, and work
Add all services with descriptions and prices

review_acquisition_process: Send review request email 2 weeks after project completion

Respond to every review (positive and negative) publicly

homepage_hero_text.h1: India's Most Results-Driven Digital Marketing Agency
homepage_hero_text.subheadline: SEO, Google Ads, Social Media & AI Automation — all under one roof. Trusted by 500+ businesses across India, Dubai, and the Middle East.
homepage_hero_text.trust_strip: ★★★★★ 4.9 Google Rating | 500+ Clients | ₹50Cr+ Revenue Generated | Google Partner | Delhi-Based, Globally Trusted

content_text_samples.homepage_about_blurb: Digital Penta was built on a single insight: fragmented agencies deliver fragmented results. When your SEO team doesn't talk to your ads team, and your ads team ignores your content strategy, growth stalls. We built something different. Five integrated disciplines — Marketing, PR, Development, AI, and Automation — working as one engine. The result? Compounding growth that individual agencies simply cannot match.
content_text_samples.seo_service_intro: Your competitors are ranking where your customers are searching. Every day you're not on page one of Google is a day of leads and revenue going to someone else. Our SEO team combines technical precision, content authority, and strategic link building to move your business from invisible to indispensable in your market — whether that's Delhi, Mumbai, Dubai, or across India.
content_text_samples.homepage_stats_context: These numbers aren't estimates or projections. They're the real results of 500+ campaigns run for businesses across India and the Middle East. ₹50 crore in revenue generated for clients, an average 340% increase in qualified leads, and a 95% client retention rate that proves our model works.
content_text_samples.location_delhi_intro: Delhi is India's most competitive digital market. With 20 million+ internet users in the NCR region and thousands of businesses fighting for the same search terms, ranking on Google's first page isn't just nice to have — it's survival. Our Delhi headquarters puts us at the center of this market with deep knowledge of what Delhi businesses, buyers, and search behaviors actually look like.
content_text_samples.location_dubai_intro: Dubai's digital landscape moves faster than most markets in the world. With over 9 million UAE residents and one of the highest per-capita social media usage rates globally, the opportunity for brands is enormous — but so is the competition. What makes Digital Penta different in Dubai? We're not just another agency trying to crack the UAE market. We understand both the Indian and Middle Eastern business cultures, giving our clients a unique edge when they operate across both markets.
